title: Vanish FisFis
description: An advanced and highly configurable vanish plugin for server staff, featuring timed sessions, private chat, silent join/quit messages, and detailed administrative controls.
body:
✨ **VanishFisFis** ✨
Take control of your server's staff operations with **VanishFisFis**, an advanced and highly configurable vanish plugin designed for ultimate stealth and administrative efficiency. Whether you need to observe players discreetly or manage staff in secret, VanishUltimate provides all the tools you need in one powerful package.

🌟 **Features**

- 👻 **Core Vanish:** Instantly become invisible to regular players with a simple /vanish command.

- 🤫 **Silent Join & Quit:** Vanished players can join and leave the server without any public announcements. Only staff with vanish.see permission will be notified.

- 💬 **Vanish Chat:** Communicate privately with other vanished staff members. Your messages will be completely hidden from regular players.

- ⏰ **Timed Vanish:** Set a maximum vanish duration for specific staff roles to prevent abuse. Players with bypass permission can stay vanished indefinitely. Check how long the players spent in vanish.

- 💾 **Full Persistence:** Vanish status is saved even after a player logs out or the server restarts.

- 👉 **Vanish Others:** Instantly toggle the vanish state of any other player on the server.

- 📋 **Vanish List:** Quickly see a list of all players who are currently in vanish mode with /vanish list.

- ⚙️ **Fully Configurable**: Customize every message, and setting in the config.yml to match your server's theme.

🎮 **Commands**

- **/vanish** - Toggles your own vanish state.

- **/vanish <player>** - Toggles another player's vanish state.

- **/vanish list** - Shows a list of all vanished players.

- **/vanish time <player>** - Checks the total time a player has spent in vanish.

- **/vanish reset <player>** - Resets a player's total vanish time to zero.

🔑 **Permissions**

- **vanish** - Allows a player to use /vanish.
  
- **vanish.see** - Allows a player to see vanished players and their private messages/join notifications.
  
- **vanish.other** - Allows a player to vanish other players.
  
- **vanish.list** - Allows a player to use /vanish list.
  
- **vanish.time** - Allows a player to check and reset vanish times.
  
- **vanish.time.bypass** - Exempts a player from the maximum vanish time limit.

Download **VanishFisFis** today and give your staff the ultimate tool for stealth and moderation!

✨ **Check Out Our Other Plugins!** ✨ If you enjoy the **VanishFisFis** plugin, don't forget to check out our other high-quality plugins for your server!

- **BuildByBit:** https://builtbybit.com/creators/fisfiskoray.600970
- **PolyMart:** https://polymart.org/user/57522/fisfiskoray
- **Modrinth:** https://modrinth.com/user/FisFisKoray
